plugins.name: stopgate
plugins.description: Stop hook that blocks lazy stops and returns actionable directives. Uses an Opus LLM call to classify whether the assistant actually finished its task.

plugins.name: gateway-mcp
plugins.description: Configures the Cassandra Gateway MCP (execute) and per-service discovery servers. Adds streamable-http MCP server configs to .mcp.json.

plugins.name: acl-lint
plugins.description: Pre-tool hook that validates acl.yaml structure — catches bad service names, missing groups, invalid policy syntax before they hit production.
